children.text: Even a couple who stays perfectly healthy and does everything right fertility-wise may encounter difficulty getting pregnant out of mere bad luck, as it takes the average couple approximately six months to conceive. Ovia can help you get pregnant faster. Ovia helps you understand your fertility and general health in a completely new way. We help you identify trends and give you specific advice around what you should be doing to achieve your goals.

Tracking your fertility data can help increase your chances of conceiving in a given cycle from 20% to 70%, but logging and making sense of all of this data is easier said than done! Fortunately, Ovia has developed Ovia Fertility, a state-of-the-art ovulation predictor that helps you easily log and make sense of your data, providing you with accurate fertility projections, feedback, and analysis.

Trying to conceive can be a new experience for lots of women, particularly those who spent years crossing their fingers and hoping NOT to get pregnant! Some women fear that their past use of birth control may permanently interfere with their chances of conceiving, but this is extremely rare. Whatever the method of birth control is, the great majority of women are able to conceive after taking birth control, even if their cycle takes some time to get back to normal.
Travelling and stress can induce changes in your normal menstrual cycle and ovulation patterns. Learn more about why in this article.
Is my partner ready to have a baby?
So you're thinking of having a baby. You might have been dreaming about getting pregnant and being a parent your whole life, but what about your partner?

Most people know that drinking alcohol, and smoking anything while pregnant is a HUGE no-no, but did you know that drinking and smoking can actually hurt your chances of conceiving as well? These substances not only decrease your fertility, but can decrease your partner's as well.
